feedItems.description: allocated £63.4m to Children's Social Care (≈£335 per resident)
allocated £18.3m to Public Health (≈£97 per resident)
allocated £89.2m to Adult Social Care (≈£473 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £114 (5.2%) to £2289
